authorized_by: Licensed CrossFit affiliate and CrossFit-L2 trainer in good standing (identity withheld by request; on file with the maintainer and confirmable by CrossFit, LLC on request)
permitted_uses: Descriptive / nominative use of the CrossFit® word mark (with the registered symbol, as an adjective) to identify content that applies the CrossFit methodology
Use consistent with the licensee's CrossFit Affiliate Agreement and CrossFit Trainer Agreement
notes: This authorization covers DESCRIPTIVE methodology use of the CrossFit® word mark under the licensee's CrossFit Affiliate and Trainer agreements. It is NOT a claim of sponsorship, endorsement, approval, partnership, or certification by CrossFit, LLC, and the licensee makes no such claim. The pack remains an independent work that applies the CrossFit methodology. The CrossFit® mark is used only as an adjective with the registered symbol; it is NOT placed in the catalog's official-partner / authored-by registry. The pack's display name is kept neutral ('Functional Fitness Coaching Pack'); CrossFit® appears as a methodology badge only. The licensee's name and affiliate are intentionally not published here; standing (CF-L2, good standing) is verifiable on request.
